src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot servlet initializer import to the new package structure introduced in Spring Boot 2.0+.
Update the JHipster configuration utility import to reflect the new package structure in JHipster 6+.
Refine class-level Javadoc for better formatting and capitalization consistency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: This is a helper Java class that provides an alternative to creating a {@code web.xml}.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace a multi-line Javadoc comment with a concise single-line comment for internal logic.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit Spring component scanning and auto-configuration annotations with the consolidated @SpringBootApplication annotation.
Switch from field injection using @Inject to constructor injection for the Environment bean to improve testability and immutability.
Update imports to use the new tech.jhipster.config package structure instead of the old io.github.jhipster.sample.config structure.
Replace references to local Constants class with JHipsterConstants from the new library for profile checks.
Remove the throws UnknownHostException declaration from main and handle the exception internally to simplify the method signature.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public static void main(String[] args) { ... try { ... } catch (UnknownHostException e) { ... } }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract application startup logging logic into a dedicated private method for better code organization.
Update the application to use server.servlet.context-path instead of the deprecated server.context-path for Spring Boot 2.x compatibility.
Modernize SSL protocol detection by checking for server.ssl.key-store property instead of relying on port numbers or other heuristics.
Replace the deprecated JHipsterProperties class with the new ApplicationProperties class in the configuration properties annotation.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Inject on Environment field and added public LoggingAspect(Environment env) constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the newer Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...)) API instead of the older string array method.
Refactor AspectJ pointcuts to target Spring stereotypes and specific packages rather than broad package wildcards, improving precision.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced single loggingPointcut with springBeanPointcut (stereotypes) and applicationPackagePointcut (packages).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Extract logger retrieval into a helper method to reduce code duplication and ensure the logger matches the target class of the join point.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private Logger logger(JoinPoint joinPoint) method and replaced inline LoggerFactory calls.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify logging output by removing the declaring type name from log messages, as the logger itself is already scoped to the class.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final TaskExecutionProperties taskExecutionProperties; public AsyncConfiguration(TaskExecutionProperties taskExecutionProperties) { this.taskExecutionProperties = taskExecutionProperties; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate from custom JHipsterProperties to standard Spring Boot TaskExecutionProperties for thread pool configuration.
Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Remove unused javax.inject.Inject import as field injection was replaced.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring scheduling annotations.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for required dependencies to improve testability and adhere to modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public CacheConfiguration(Environment env, ...) { this.env = env; ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use setter injection with @Autowired(required=false) for the optional Registration bean instead of field injection.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Autowired(required = false) public void setRegistration(Registration registration) { this.registration = registration; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update profile checking logic to use the new Spring Boot 2.x Profiles.of() API instead of the deprecated string constant approach.
Switch from using DiscoveryClient to get service ID to using the Registration bean, aligning with Spring Cloud Commons changes.
Add a null check for the Registration bean to handle cases where no discovery service is configured, preventing NullPointerExceptions.
Add a check to reuse an existing Hazelcast instance if one is already initialized, preventing duplicate initialization issues.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: HazelcastInstance hazelCastInstance = Hazelcast.getHazelcastInstanceByName(...); if (hazelCastInstance != null) return hazelCastInstance;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Clean up imports by removing unused classes and consolidating wildcard imports where appropriate.
Remove the @AutoConfigureAfter annotation which is no longer necessary or recommended in the updated Spring Boot configuration.
Simplify the cacheManager bean definition by returning the new instance directly instead of assigning it to a field.
Removed legacy login regex and various Spring profile string constants that are no longer used in the application.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Deleted LOGIN_REGEX, SPRING_PROFILE_DEVELOPMENT, SPRING_PROFILE_PRODUCTION, SPRING_PROFILE_CLOUD, SPRING_PROFILE_HEROKU, SPRING_PROFILE_SWAGGER, and SPRING_PROFILE_NO_LIQUIBASE.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Renamed the system account constant to a shorter name to align with updated codebase conventions.
Standardized the private constructor formatting by removing unnecessary whitespace.
Replace field injection with constructor injection for the Environment bean to align with modern Spring best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private final Environment env; public DatabaseConfiguration(Environment env) { this.env = env; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate H2 TCP server creation to a dedicated JHipster helper class instead of using raw H2 API calls.
Implement logic to calculate a valid H2 TCP port based on the server port to avoid conflicts.
Remove manual Liquibase bean configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove manual Hibernate4Module bean configuration as it is likely handled by auto-configuration or no longer needed.
Update profile constant reference from local Constants to JHipsterConstants.
Remove unused imports related to Liquibase, Hibernate, and H2 Server classes that are no longer directly used.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for AsyncSpringLiquibase, Hibernate4Module, SpringLiquibase, Server, etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter class with the WebMvcConfigurer interface to comply with Spring Framework 5.x requirements.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: extends WebMvcConfigurerAdapter implements EnvironmentAware -> implements WebMvcConfigurer

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the EnvironmentAware interface implementation and associated property resolver logic as it is no longer required for the locale resolver configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implements EnvironmentAware, setEnvironment method, and RelaxedPropertyResolver field.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import for AngularCookieLocaleResolver to use the new tech.jhipster package structure.
Remove the explicit bean name from the @Bean annotation as it is not strictly necessary for the locale resolver.
Consolidate multiple specific WebMvcConfigurer imports into a wildcard import for cleaner code.
Replace deprecated generic Spring Constants with JHipster-specific JHipsterConstants for profile definition.
Inject Environment into the bean method to pass it to the LoggingAspect constructor.
Update LoggingAspect instantiation to accept the Environment argument.
Replace field injection with constructor injection to align with modern Spring Boot best practices.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed from @Inject fields to constructor parameters for JHipsterProperties, ObjectMapper, and BuildProperties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on javax.annotation.PostConstruct which is deprecated in Java 11+ and removed in Java 11 modules by default.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @PostConstruct annotation and moved initialization logic into the constructor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove dependency on javax.inject.Inject which is part of the Java EE API not included in standard Java 11 distributions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import javax.inject.Inject and replaced with constructor injection.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate complex Logback appender configuration to JHipster utility methods to reduce boilerplate and ensure consistency.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced manual LogstashSocketAppender and AsyncAppender setup with calls to addLogstashTcpSocketAppender and addJsonConsoleAppender from LoggingUtils.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add support for JSON formatted console logging based on application properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added conditional call to addJsonConsoleAppender if loggingProperties.isUseJsonFormat() is true.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Include application build version in logging custom fields using Spring Boot BuildProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added ObjectProvider<BuildProperties> to constructor and mapped version to custom fields map.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on Eureka instance ID from logging configuration, likely due to modularization or optional Eureka usage.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @Value("${eureka.instance.instanceId}") and removed instance_id from custom fields JSON.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Enable configuration refresh for logging settings when using Spring Cloud Config.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added @RefreshScope annotation to the LoggingConfiguration class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Dropwizard Metrics servlet and filter initialization code that is no longer part of the configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for com.codahale.metrics, removed MetricRegistry field, and deleted initMetrics method and its call in onStartup.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Hazelcast instance injection and related imports as it is no longer managed in this class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import for com.hazelcast.core.HazelcastInstance and the hazelcastInstance field.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer with Spring Boot 2.x WebServerFactoryCustomizer or remove if unused.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed implementation of EmbeddedServletContainerCustomizer, removed customize method, and updated imports from org.springframework.boot.context.embedded to org.springframework.boot.web.server.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch from field injection using @Inject/@Autowired to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced @Inject fields with final fields and added a constructor to initialize Environment and JHipsterProperties.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update environment profile checking to use the new Spring Boot 2.x Profiles API.
Fix potential logging issue with array arguments by casting to Object[] to ensure proper formatting.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed Arrays.toString(env.getActiveProfiles()) to (Object[]) env.getActiveProfiles() in log.info call.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS filter registration to use new JHipster properties structure and add support for Swagger v3 endpoints.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed @ConditionalOnProperty, added check for !CollectionUtils.isEmpty(config.getAllowedOrigins()), and updated registered paths to include /management/** and /v3/api-docs.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Delegate H2 console initialization to a dedicated helper class instead of manual servlet registration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced manual ServletRegistration code in initH2Console with a call to H2ConfigurationHelper.initH2Console(servletContext).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Removes the @Audited annotation from Hibernate Envers, likely due to dependency removal or configuration change in the migration.
Changes the date fields from ZonedDateTime to Instant to align with modern Java time API usage.
Updates the JPA column definition for created_date to use updatable=false instead of nullable=false.
Refines the class-level Javadoc comment for clarity.
